summary: IP Anomaly Detection feature testing complete. Backend: 32/32 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components verified working - stats display, severity breakdown, filters, alert list, resolve button, settings panel with toggles and inputs.

tests: Super admin gets stats with total, unresolved, last_24h, last_7d, by_severity, by_type
Tenant admin can access stats (filtered by tenant)
by_severity contains low, medium, high, critical
Super admin can list alerts with pagination (alerts, total, limit, offset)
Tenant admin can list alerts (filtered by tenant)
Returns message and alert_id on success
Super admin can resolve all alerts
Tenant admin can resolve all (filtered by tenant)
Returns: new_ip_alerts_enabled, rapid_ip_window_minutes, rapid_ip_threshold, brute_force_window_minutes, brute_force_threshold, alert_email_enabled
Returns 403 for tenant admins (super admin only)
Super admin can update boolean settings
Super admin can update numeric settings
Returns 403 for tenant admins (super admin only)
Super admin can view login history
Returns records array with email, ip_address, timestamp, success fields
Successful login records IP in ip_login_history
New IP alert created on first login from new IP

components_verified: security-stats-grid - Shows Unresolved, Last 24h, Last 7 Days, Total stats
severity-breakdown - Shows Critical, High, Medium, Low counts
security-filters - Severity, Type, Status dropdowns
alerts-list - Displays alert cards with resolve buttons
security-settings-toggle-btn - Opens settings panel
security-refresh-btn - Refreshes data
setting-new-ip-toggle - Toggle for new IP alerts
setting-rapid-window - Input for rapid IP window minutes
setting-rapid-threshold - Input for rapid IP threshold
setting-bf-window - Input for brute force window minutes
setting-bf-threshold - Input for brute force threshold
setting-email-toggle - Toggle for email alerts to admins
save-settings-btn - Save Settings button
Alert type with icon (New IP Address, Rapid IP Change, Brute-Force)
Severity badge (critical/high/medium/low)
Alert details message
User email and IP address
Timestamp
Resolve button (resolve-btn-{alert_id})
Resolved badge when alert is resolved

navigation.super_admin_dashboard: Security Alerts button at /admin/super with data-testid='security-alerts-nav-btn'

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ All security endpoints correctly require admin role
✓ Settings update and login history endpoints correctly restricted to super_admin
✓ Tenant admins can only see alerts from their tenant
✓ Students get 403 on all security endpoints
✓ Login IP recording works for both successful and failed logins
✓ New IP alerts created automatically on first login from new IP
✓ All data-testid attributes present for testing
✓ UI correctly displays stats, severity breakdown, filters, and alert list
✓ Resolve button works and shows success toast
✓ Settings panel toggles and inputs working
seed_data_creation: IP anomaly alerts created during testing via login (visible in UI)
context_for_next_testing_agent: IP Anomaly Detection feature fully tested. Backend tests: /app/backend/tests/test_ip_anomaly.py (32 tests). Settings management restricted to super_admin. Login history restricted to super_admin. Tenant admins can read alerts/stats/settings but not modify settings. Students get 403 on all endpoints. Login triggers IP recording and anomaly detection automatically. student1@ormond.com is rate-limited/locked - use student2@ormond.com for testing.
